features: 🌿 Experience the Power of Hemp Toothpaste Discover XOC Hemp Toothpaste 100ml + FREE Toothbrush, crafted with natural hemp seed oil to promote gentle oral care and leave your mouth feeling fresh and healthy every day. Perfect for anyone looking for a hemp toothpaste fluoride free option.

😁 Fresh Breath & Gentle Cleansing Formulated with natural ingredients and Omega 3, 6 & 9, this hemp toothpaste removes plaque, fights bad breath, and keeps your teeth feeling clean and smooth — without harsh chemicals.

🦷 Fights Everyday Stains Naturally Say goodbye to tea, coffee, and wine stains! Our XOC hemp toothpaste 100ml + toothbrush formula helps whiten teeth naturally while protecting enamel and maintaining a bright, confident smile.

🌱 Fluoride-Free, Vegan & Eco-Friendly Designed for those who care about natural oral hygiene, this hemp toothpaste fluoride free formula is vegan-friendly, safe for sensitive teeth, and perfect for anyone looking for a toothpaste pack without harmful additives.

🎁 FREE Toothbrush in Every Pack Every box comes with a soft-bristle toothbrush designed for gentle, effective cleaning. Choose from 2-pack and 3-pack bundles — perfect for travel, families, and sharing.
description: Product description Enjoy plant-powered freshness with this twin pack of XOC Hemp Toothpaste! Each tube combines natural hemp seed oil with Omega 3-6-9 to help fight bad breath and remove daily stains from tea, coffee, and red wine. Ideal for keeping your breath fresh and your smile bright — all day, every day. Each pack includes two 100ml toothpaste tubes and two soft-bristle toothbrushes. Perfect for couples, frequent travellers, or simply stocking up at home. ✅ Fluoride-free & vegan ✅ Gentle whitening with natural silica ✅ Free soft-bristle toothbrush included in each tube ✅ Ideal for daily use and fresh breath confidence Directions Use a pea size amount of toothpaste for supervised brushing to minimise swallowing. Not suitable for children under 6 years old. Safety Warning Use a pea size amount for supervised brushing to minimise swallowing. Not suitable for children of 6 years and younger. See more
